title: Cat Splashes
description: Replaces all splash messages with cat related ones.
body:
A simple resourcepack that replaces all splashes with cat-themed replacements. Simple to add to any modpack! Currently adds 21 different splashes to the game.

Made for cat-lovers, by cat-lovers.

List of all splashes:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

All praise our lords and saviours, cats!

Maxwell cat

Bingus cat

Big Floppa offers you watermelon. Do you accept?

Me petting my cat (These are our last moments)

Fun fact: Cat

Demonic Little Grey Cat

Turn on Lolcat now.

Fun fact: Minecraft has cats

Felis Catus!

Juvenile members of the species of felines known as "Felis Catus" are often referred to as kittens.

Cat

Cat.

Cat!

Cat?

Kitten

Kitten.

Kitten!

Kitten?

=>-.-<=

I pet cats, therefore I am

</details>
